name: psilocybin
mechanism: converted to psilocin which acts as 5-ht2a agonist
contraindications: avoid with unstable mental health conditions
safetyNotes: Toxic – controlled psychedelic,nausea,anxiety,transient increase in heart rate.,Low toxicity,wide margin of safety.
description: Psilocybin is a medicinal herb traditionally used for visual patterns and mystical insight.
dosage: 10,25 mg pure or ~1,5 g dried mushrooms
